name: Blockscout Explorer
longDescription: Blockscout MCP server for blockchain analysis. Get address info, token holdings, NFTs, transaction history, contract ABIs, and read smart contracts. Supports 100+ EVM chains with ENS resolution.
author: com.blockscout
examplePrompts: Get info about this Ethereum address
Show me all ERC20 tokens held by this wallet
What NFTs does this address own?
Get the ABI for this smart contract
Show me recent transactions for this address
